{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603211813345DFC7AE17C67A7DE4884\"}"},"total":551},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7265194383661368122","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一次写这么多字，还是真心实意的，呜呜居然不是长评！过分！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691559985,"group_id":"7250653874682334212","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1539734288729630"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250653874682334212","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.88134e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7881,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7265193879098704677","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很真实，也很好看。林江，我们亲爱的女主。他是真真的硬汉猛男哇。一个娇养咸鱼的姑娘，一朝穿越成男人，吃不饱穿不暖，看到尸体也会吐和害怕，但是也会鼓起勇气去拖运埋。善为己身。真可谓是，穷则独善其，身达则兼善天下。他努力的活着，努力的学习。看了也有好几本女穿男，这。是我看过最好的。如果觉得我说的话有问题反对那就是你的对，对对对，你说的都对。希望大大爆更！大大，你写出这样好的文！你也是好好人！！！爆更！不够看！呜呜呜呜！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691559861,"group_id":"7250653874682334212","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"什么类型都吃一口，拒绝依托达辩。最终爱女文学。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1z2HrOqHtza2KYSWLS7PlnIVV8fPHu4qwJClOHxhUcL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e5cbc2b606f5416480756a79fd20e3f7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776622622\u0026x-signature=LgfyudlDpY9hX0e4Z9CXKtFQUkU%3D","user_id":"1539734288729630","user_name":"烤肉火锅奶茶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1539734288729630","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1740734245,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250653874682334212","book_info":{"abstract":"现代咸鱼躺的富二代戚梵烟莫名其妙的穿越到了异时空的古代，不仅悲催的穿到了一个名为林江的男人身上，家里还穷的叮当响，甚至连饭都吃不饱！为了活下去，也为了寻找渺茫的回家机会，林江辞别了父母，离开了家乡，踏上了闯荡异世界的路，这一路，他走的异常的艰难和凶险...........","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o671cd77901c0c98ea7a4a4e249cc66b5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"孤叶舟","author_id":"","book_id":"7250653874682334212","book_name":"绍年不负卿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0c0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":275,\"name\":\"双男主\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275\u0026name=双男主\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":758,\"name\":\"古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758\u0026name=古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1012,\"name\":\"纯爱\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012\u0026name=纯爱\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7250653879975543330","read_count":"644","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"420053"},"relate_post_id":"","r T/I8bmnFIRgoxCi8vdhBjb5","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0a10d569c7ac4f95956f6ebc94129d18~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776623613\u0026x-signature=WpjuSQZXHhSKmc5EaCCS2Q11obU%3D","user_id":"2252229494192471","user_name":"紫邪不邪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2252229494192471","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1747442041,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250653874682334212","book_info":{"abstract":"现代咸鱼躺的富二代戚梵烟莫名其妙的穿越到了异时空的古代，不仅悲催的穿到了一个名为林江的男人身上，家里还穷的叮当响，甚至连饭都吃不饱！为了活下去，也为了寻找渺茫的回家机会，林江辞别了父母，离开了家乡，踏上了闯荡异世界的路，这一路，他走的异常的艰难和凶险...........","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o671cd77901c0c98ea7a4a4e249cc66b5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"孤叶舟","author_id":"","book_id":"7250653874682334212","book_name":"绍年不负卿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0c0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1" ,"s":21,"text":"双男主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%B7%E4%B8%BB\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774088014A7DE4884%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227386965206737830718%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227250653874682334212%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%B7%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719914439,"group_id":"7250653874682334212","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"求推荐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3Xpy5DJaGAuR8o0sEUupGkSiJWTxM8v2lUkLhN9bdc1","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2847fa31c08e467da2a7701d903cc34c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776623026\u0026x-signature=tyfF9YQySzGQINMz3iJgSsEZiqE%3D","user_id":"4095046517014200","user_name":"米心心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4095046517014200","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250653874682334212","book_info":{"abstract":"现代咸鱼躺的富二代戚梵烟莫名其妙的穿越到了异时空的古代，不仅悲催的穿到了一个名为林江的男人身上，家里还穷的叮当响，甚至连饭都吃不饱！为了活下去，也为了寻找渺茫的回家机会，林江辞别了父母，离开了家乡，踏上了闯荡异世界的路，这一路，他走的异常的艰难和凶险...........","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o671cd77901c0c98ea7a4a4e249cc66b5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"孤叶舟","author_id":"","book_id":"7250653874682334212","book_name":"绍年不负卿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0c0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","
